sutta: the buddha said monks there are these 4 right efforts what 4 herein among generates desire for the non-arising of evil and profitable states that have not yet arisen he makes an effort sets going energy he lays hold off and exerts his mind to this end he generates desire for the abandoning of evil and profitable states that have arisen he makes an effort assets going energy etc and then the third 1 he generates desire for the arising of profitable states not yet arisen he makes an effort says going energy et cetera and the fourth 1 he generates desire for the persisting for the non-confusion for the cultivation for the increase development and augmentation of profitable states that have arisen he makes an effort sets going energy lays hold up and exerts his mind to this end these monks are the 4 right efforts
commentary: this suta is talking about sama padana the 4 right efforts which is 1 of the factors of the aryan eightfold path and the first 1 is to not to allow evil and profitable states that have not yet arisen to arise this unprofitable the the the the word is a translation of akusala akusala is unprofitable or unskillful states is dharma sometimes you can say thoughts or sola anything that comes up in the mind that is uh unprofitable uh evil uh unskillfulness that leads to suffering leads to remorse if they have not arisen we should not allow it to arise then the second 1 if it is already a risen and evil unprofitable states that have already arisen then we should abandon it and that's why we have to always observe our mind and the third 1 is if profitable states have not arisen in our mind then we generate and generate these profitable states in our mind like for example energy intelligence [Music] earnestness the desire to to practice the the spiritual teachings and the fourth 1 if the profitable states have already arisen then we should develop it and augment it and cultivate it so that it develops even further uh these are the 4 right efforts sama padana then the nexuta has a little to do with it is

abandoning evil and profitable states that have already arisen
generating profitable states that have not yet arisen
developing and augmenting profitable states that have already arisen
